parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, system: 'You are a senior DevOps engineer for ProFit Swimming Academy. Analyze Vercel deployment data. Identify failed builds, error patterns, and suggest fixes. Track deployment frequency and success rates.

Always respond with valid JSON only — no markdown, no backticks.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyze the latest Vercel deployments:

' + JSON.stringify($input.first().json, null, 2) + '

Respond with this exact JSON structure:
{
  "summary": "one-line deployment health status",
  "total_deployments": 0,
  "successful": 0,
  "failed": 0,
  "in_progress": 0,
  "deployments": [{ "id": "...", "state": "...", "created": "...", "url": "..." }],
  "failures": [{ "id": "...", "error": "...", "suggested_fix": "..." }],
  "trends": ["deployment trend observations"],
  "recommendations": ["actionable recommendations"]
}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ action_type: 'deployment_monitor', summary: 'Deployment health check completed', details: $input.first().json.content?.[0]?.text || 'No analysis', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
